title: Administrative Burden Baseline Update 2022 - Health Canada - Canada.ca - Canada.ca
content:
## Administrative Burden Baseline Update 2022
The Administrative  Burden Baseline provides Canadians with a clear metric on the total number of requirements in federal regulations and associated forms that impose administrative burden on business. This baseline contributes to the openness and transparency of the federal regulatory system.
All federal regulations that are administered by Health Canada that have  requirements that impose administrative burden on business are identified  below. The total count for 2022 is 20,479, which is a net decrease from  the 2021 count of 20,526. During  the reporting period, the department amended 13 regulations that resulted in  changes to administrative burden. The amendments affecting administrative  burden included measures required to respond to the COVID-19 pandemic and other  non COVID-related amendments to the Medical  Devices Regulations and Natural Health Products Regulations .
The total June 30, 2014 baseline count is 15,649 and can be  viewed on the June  30, 2014 Administrative Burden Baseline Count page.

### Title of act: Canadian Environmental  Protection Act, 1999
The Administrative Burden Baseline  counts for the Canadian Environment Protection Act, 1999 are posted on  Environment and Climate  Change Canada's website. Please visit Environment and Climate Change Canada's Administrative Burden Baseline Page to view this count.

The Administrative Burden Baseline counts for the Cannabis Act (Police Enforcement) Regulations are the responsibility of Public Safety Canada. Please visit Public Safety Canada's Administrative Burden Baseline page for more information.

Table 6 Footnote * Since the coming into force  of the Controlled Drugs and Substances  Act in 1997, by virtue of the Interpretation  Act , Parts G and J of the Food and  Drug Regulations are deemed to have been made under the CDSA and form part  of the legislative framework for controlled substances. ### Title of act: Patent Act
The Administrative Burden Baseline counts  for the Patent Act are posted on Industry, Science and Economic Development Canada's website. Please visit Industry, Science and Economic Development Canada's Administrative  Burden Baseline page to view this count. For the Patented Medicine Regulations, please visit the Patented  Medicine Prices Review Board's Administrative Burden Baseline page to view the count.
